pages.text:
API Specs - External‚Äã
1. Ads‚Äã
1.1 Create Ad‚Äã
Creates a new ad.  ‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
POST /api/v5/p2p/ad/create‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
automatedM
essage‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Message that is sent to taker when an order is placed on this ad‚Äã
cryptoAmou
nt‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The quantity of cryptocurrency‚Äã
cryptoCurre
ncy‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The crypto currency symbol. Example: BTC‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The fiat currency symbol. Example: USD‚Äã
isProofRequi
red‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
No‚Äã
Indicates whether a proof (e.g., bank statement) is required for CNY 
ads. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
isPublic‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
No‚Äã
Indicates whether the ad is targeted for public or private 
marketplace. Valid values: true,false
maxOrderLi
mit‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The maximum order limit. Example: 990.00‚Äã
maxPaymen
tDurationIn
Minutes‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The maximum time allowed for payment in minutes before 
timeout happens. Valid values can be fetched from the /config API 
from maxPaymentDurationAllowedValues field.‚Äã
 Examples: 5,10,15,30,60,120‚Äã
minAccount
Age‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The number of days since the user has registered (sign-up date). 
Valid values are: 30, 60, 180, 365‚Äã

pages.text:
minComplet
edOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum number of completed orders by the transaction 
party‚Äã
minComplet
ionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum order completion rate of the taker. Example: 0.95‚Äã
minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid values: 
1,2,3‚Äã
minOrderLi
mit‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The minimum order limit. Example: 890.00
minSellOrde
rs‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum number of sell orders completed by the taker. 
Example: 5‚Äã
paymentMet
hodIds‚Äã
Array of 
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The Ids of payment methods which maker accepts for payments. 
Applicable only for 'sell' ads. Example: [1234]‚Äã
paymentMet
hods‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The payment methods which maker can transact in. Applicable 
only for 'buy' ads. Example: bank‚Äã
priceFloor‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The lowest price before the user's ad is hidden. Applicable only for 
ads with price type as floating_market. Example: 890.00‚Äã
priceMargin‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only for ads 
with price type as floating_market. Example: 0.01‚Äã
remark‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Additional information or trading instructions for the ad for taker‚Äã
side‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Use buy to indicate a 
buy transaction, sell for a sell ‚Äã
transaction.‚Äã
targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: 
common,certified,diamond,all‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Ad price type. Valid values are: limit, floating_market‚Äã
unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The unit price in fiat currency. Applicable only for ads with price 
type as fixed price. Example: 1.1‚Äã
verificationT
ype‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Verification type for overseas ads excluding CNY. Valid values: 0 (No 
verification), 1 (Verification)‚Äã
verificationN
otes‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
No‚Äã
Notes set by the maker for Verification Ads to be shown as a 
prompt to the taker‚Äã

> id‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã

Valid values (CNY): ‚Äã

Valid values (Overseas): ‚Äã
10 (Chat before payment)‚Äã
11 (No 3rd party payment)‚Äã
12 (Provide payment proof)‚Äã

isInstantSettlePaym
ent‚Äã
> transferSpeed‚Äã
String‚Äã
Indicates the speed of the payment method. Valid 
values: ‚Äã
0 (nil): No specific speed requirement or processing time 
mentioned. ‚Äã
1 (real time): Payment is expected to be processed 
immediately or in real-time.‚Äã
2 (instant crypto release): Payment release or 
confirmation is expected to be instant for cryptocurrency 
transactions.‚Äã
3 (up to X days): Payment processing may take up to a 
certain number of days, where X represents the specific 
number of days mentioned.‚Äã

11 (No 3rd party payment)‚Äã

>viewType‚Äã
String‚Äã
For UI display can ignore for OpenAPI ‚Äã
> constraints‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Constraints specified by the user‚Äã
>> active‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the constraint is active‚Äã
>> max‚Äã
Integer‚Äã
Max payment account duration value‚Äã

pages.text:
>> min‚Äã
Integer‚Äã
Min payment account duration value
>> maxLength‚Äã
Integer‚Äã
Max length for others constraint value‚Äã
>variables‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Variables specified by the user for verification notes‚Äã
>> num‚Äã
Integer‚Äã
Number‚Äã
>> others‚Äã
String‚Äã
Miscellaneous‚Äã
verificationType‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies the verification type. Applies for Overseas Ads. 
Valid values:‚Äã
0 (no verification required)‚Äã
1 (verification required)‚Äã
whitelistedCountrie
s‚Äã
String‚Äã
Regions that the taker must be from, as set by the maker 
of the ad‚Äã
1.3 Update Ad‚Äã
This operation would cancel the existing order and create a new one. If the required parameters 
are not passed, then we default to using the old ad values. ‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
POST /api/v5/p2p/ad/update‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
adId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Id of the Ad which needs to be updated‚Äã
online‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Status of the ad: true (online), false (offline)‚Äã
minOrderLimit‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum order limit. Example: 890.00
maxOrderLimi
t‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The maximum order limit. Example: 990.00‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Ad price type. Valid values are: limit, floating_market‚Äã
priceMargin‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only for 
ads with price type as floating price. Example: 0.01‚Äã
unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The unit price in fiat currency. Applicable only for ads with price 
type as fixed price. Example: 1.1‚Äã

pages.text:
cryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The quantity of cryptocurrency‚Äã
priceFloor‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The lowest price before the user's ad is hidden. Example: 890.00‚Äã
isPublic‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Indicates whether the ad is targeted for public or private 
marketplace. Valid values: true,false
paymentMeth
odIds‚Äã
Array of 
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The Ids of payment methods which maker accepts for payments. 
Applicable only for 'sell' ads. Example: [1234]‚Äã
paymentMeth
ods‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The payment methods which maker can transact in. Applicable 
only for 'buy' ads. Example: bank‚Äã
minCompleted
Orders‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum number of completed orders by the taker‚Äã
minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid values: 
1,2,3‚Äã
minSellOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum number of sell orders completed by the taker. 
Example: 5‚Äã
minCompletio
nRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum order completion rate of the taker. Example: 0.95‚Äã
minAccountAg
e‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The number of days since the user has registered (sign-up date). 
Valid values are: 30, 60, 180, 365‚Äã
targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: 
common,certified,diamond,all‚Äã
maxPaymentD
urationInMinut
es‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The maximum time allowed for payment in minutes before 
timeout happens. Valid values: 5,10,15,30,60,120‚Äã
isProofRequire
d‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Indicates whether proof (e.g., bank statement) is required for CNY 
ads. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
whitelistedCou
ntries‚Äã
Array of 
String‚Äã
No‚Äã

pages.text:
side‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Use buy to 
indicate a buy transaction, sell for a sell transaction, or all to 
include both buy and sell transactions.‚Äã
cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol‚Äã
targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: 
common,certified,diamond,all,blockTrade,flashtrade‚Äã
minCryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Minimum amount of crypto‚Äã
cryptoQuota‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The crypto currency limit, which is the amount of crypto 
currency multiplied by the unit price and the comparison of 
the limit of the order. Example: 5.9‚Äã
minFiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Fiat currency quantity (ads with fiat amount less than this 
number would be filtered out)‚Äã
maxFiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Fiat currency quantity (ads with fiat amount greater than 
this number would be filtered out)‚Äã
minFiatAmountPerOr
der‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum fiat amount required for a single order. Any 
ads with orders placed for an amount less than this 
threshold will be filtered out‚Äã
maxFiatAmountPerO
rder‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The maximum fiat amount required for a single order. Any 
ads with orders placed for an amount greater than this 
threshold will be filtered out‚Äã
paymentMethod‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Payment method. Default: all. Examples: all, bank, aliPay, 
wxPay‚Äã
isTradable‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad is tradable or not. Default: false‚Äã
isSecurityLimitApplic
able‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether to show T+1 ads. Default: false‚Äã
shouldShowOnlyFoll
ow‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether to fetch ads from users which the current 
user follows. Default: false. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
showAlreadyTraded‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether to fetch ads which have already been 
traded with the user. Default: false. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
isProofRequired‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether verification is required for the ads. 
Default: false. Valid values: true, false‚Äã

hideOverseasVerifica
tionAds‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether to hide overseas verification ads. Default: 
false. Applies only for non-CNY regions. Valid values: true, 
false‚Äã
limit‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Maximum number of items returned‚Äã
sortType‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Sort type for the ads. Valid values: 
default,recommended,price_asc,price_desc‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
sellAds‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Collection of sell ad details‚Äã
buyAds‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Collection of buy ad details‚Äã
> adId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad Id‚Äã
> minSellOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Minimum number of sell orders completed by the trading 
party‚Äã
> side‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Valid values: 
buy,sell,block_buy,block_sell‚Äã
> cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
> fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol‚Äã
> minOrderSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order lower limit‚Äã
> maxOrderSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order upper limit‚Äã
> availableAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The available current quantity that can be bought/sold‚Äã
> unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
The unit price in fiat currency. Applicable only for ads with 
price type as fixed price. Example: 1.1‚Äã
> creator‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Information about the ad creator.‚Äã

Boolean‚Äã

user‚Äã
>> nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the ad creator‚Äã

>> userId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Id of the ad creator‚Äã
>> cancelledOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of orders cancelled by the user‚Äã
>> merchantId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant Id‚Äã
>> type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad creator type. Valid values: all, common (non-
authenticated), certified (authenticated)‚Äã
>> completedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Total orders completed by the ad creator‚Äã
>> completionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
Completion rate of the ad creator‚Äã
>> isBlacklistedByUser‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad creator is blocked by the user‚Äã
> paymentMethods‚Äã
Array of 
String‚Äã
Collection of payment methods. Example: bank, aliPay, 
wxPay‚Äã
> 
paymentMethodBasicIn
foList‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Collection of payment method basic info set by the maker. 
Applicable for buy ads‚Äã
>> paymentMethod‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name‚Äã
>> 
isInstantSettlePayment‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
>> transferSpeed‚Äã
String‚Äã
Indicates the speed of the payment method. Valid values: ‚Äã
0 (nil): No specific speed requirement or processing time 
mentioned. ‚Äã
1 (real time): Payment is expected to be processed 
immediately or in real-time.‚Äã
2 (instant crypto release): Payment release or confirmation is 
expected to be instant for cryptocurrency transactions.‚Äã
3 (up to X days): Payment processing may take up to a 
certain number of days, where X represents the specific 
number of days mentioned.‚Äã
> fiatScale‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat Currency decimal places‚Äã
> isOwner‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad belongs to the user‚Äã
> minCompletedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum number of completed orders specified by the 
ad creator‚Äã
> maxCompletedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The maximum number of completed orders specified by the 
ad creator‚Äã

> minCompletionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum completion rate of the taker specified by the 
ad creator‚Äã
> targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: ‚Äã
common‚Äã
certified‚Äã
diamond‚Äã
all‚Äã
> 
maxAvgCompletionTim
e‚Äã
String‚Äã
The maximum average completion time of the taker‚Äã
> 
isSecurityLimitApplicabl
e‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether T+1 ad‚Äã
> isProofRequired‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicates whether a proof (e.g., bank statement) is required 
for CNY ads. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
> verificationType‚Äã
String‚Äã
Verification type for overseas ads excluding CNY. Valid 
values: 0 (No verification), 1 (Verification)‚Äã
> fiatSymbol
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Examples: Ôø•,$‚Äã
recommendedAd‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Recommended ads‚Äã
> userGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
User group that can see ad. Valid values: 0 (new users), 1 
(returning users), 2 (both)‚Äã
> ad‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Ad details. Schema is the same as what it is for buy/sell ads‚Äã

pages.text:
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Valid values: 
buy,sell,block_buy,block_sell‚Äã
cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol‚Äã
cryptoDecimalPlaces‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency decimal places‚Äã
fiatDecimalPlaces‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency decimal places‚Äã
minOrderLimit‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum order limit. Example: 890.00
maxOrderLimit‚Äã
String‚Äã
The maximum order limit. Example: 990.00‚Äã
unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
The unit price in fiat currency. Applicable only for ads with price type 
as fixed price. Example: 1.1‚Äã
fiatPriceScale‚Äã
String‚Äã
Decimal places reserved for fiat currency‚Äã
fiatPriceIncrement‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency increasing unit price gradient‚Äã
paymentMethods‚Äã
Array of 
String‚Äã
The payment methods which maker can transact in. Applicable only 
for 'buy' ads. Examples: bank,aliPay,wxPay‚Äã
depositPaymentMeth
ods‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Collection of deposit payment methods‚Äã
> paymentMethod

Boolean‚Äã

marketplace. Valid values: true,false
userLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad creator level. Valid valuesÔºöcommonÔºåcertifiedÔºådiamond‚Äã
minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid values: 
1,2,3‚Äã
1.9 Get Active ads‚Äã
Get active ads for the user. Schema is similar to Get Ad API.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
GET /api/v5/p2p/ad/active-list‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã

Yes‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Use buy to indicate a 
buy transaction, sell for a sell ‚Äã
transaction.‚Äã
cryptoCurren
cy‚Äã

Yes‚Äã
The crypto currency symbol. Example: BTC‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã

Yes‚Äã

buy‚Äã

pages.text:
> kycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The identity verification level of the user‚Äã
> acceptStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order acceptance status of the user. Valid values: 0 (do not 
accept order), 1 (accept order)‚Äã
> 
avgPaymentTimeInSecon
ds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average payment time in seconds‚Äã
> 
avgCompletionTimeInSec
onds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average completion time in seconds‚Äã
> createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
User joining timestamp in milliseconds‚Äã
> hasAlreadyTraded‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Specifies whether the user has traded in the past with the 
requester. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
> 
paymentMethodBasicInfo
List‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Collection of payment method basic info set by the maker. 
Applicable for buy ads.‚Äã
>> paymentMethod‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name‚Äã
>> isInstantSettlePayment‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
>> transferSpeed‚Äã
String‚Äã
Indicates the speed of the payment method. Valid values: ‚Äã
0 (nil): No specific speed requirement or processing time 
mentioned. ‚Äã
1 (real time): Payment is expected to be processed immediately 
or in real-time.‚Äã
2 (instant crypto release): Payment release or confirmation is 
expected to be instant for cryptocurrency transactions.‚Äã
3 (up to X days): Payment processing may take up to a certain 
number of days, where X represents the specific number of days 
mentioned.‚Äã
minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid values: 
1,2,3‚Äã
remark‚Äã
String‚Äã
Additional information or instructions for the ad for taker‚Äã
createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
Creation time of the ad‚Äã
isHidden‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad is hidden or not‚Äã

2. Order‚Äã
2.1 Create Order‚Äã
Creates a new ad.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
POST /api/v5/p2p/order/create‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Requir
ed‚Äã
Description‚Äã
adId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Ad id for which order would be placed against‚Äã
cryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Crypto amount. Example: 1.1‚Äã
cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Crypto currency for the ad. Example: "BTC"‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Fiat currency for the ad. Example: "USD"‚Äã
makerPayment
MethodId‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Maker payment method Id‚Äã
paymentMethod‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Payment method of the counterparty. When buying crypto, it's 
the payment method of the maker.‚Äã
totalFiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Total fiat amount for the order. Example: 100.2‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Paramete
r‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
orderId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Id of the created order‚Äã
status‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order status. Valid values: 2 (new), 3 (cancelled), 4 (completed)‚Äã
orderProc
essStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order process status. Valid values:‚Äã
2 (new)‚Äã
3 (cancelled)‚Äã

ter‚Äã

d‚Äã

orderId‚Äã

y‚Äã

pages.text:
priceMargin‚Äã
String‚Äã
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only for ads 
with price type as floating price‚Äã
exchangeRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
Exchange rate‚Äã
cryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of crypto currency traded‚Äã
fiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of fiat currency traded‚Äã
paymentStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The payment status of the order. Valid values: unpaid, paid, 
unreceived, confirmed, rejected‚Äã
createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was created‚Äã
completionTimesta
mp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was completed‚Äã
updatedTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp of the last change made to the order‚Äã
completionType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of completion for the order. Example: cancelled_by_buyer‚Äã
expiredInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration time of the order in seconds‚Äã
expiredAfterInSecon
ds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration duration after completion in seconds‚Äã
frozenType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of freeze applied to the order. Valid values: sellerRejectPaid, 
customerService, sellerArbitration, appealFreeze‚Äã
disputeStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The dispute status of the order. Valid values: 0 (not appealed), 1 
(maker appealed), 2 (taker appealed), 3 (cancelled), 4 (completed)‚Äã
disputeType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of dispute‚Äã
disputeSubType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The subtype of dispute‚Äã
disputeResult‚Äã
String‚Äã
The result of the dispute‚Äã
disputeTime‚Äã
String‚Äã
The time of the dispute‚Äã
hasMakerBeenRemin
ded‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicates whether the maker has been reminded‚Äã
canRaiseDispute‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicates whether it is possible to raise dispute‚Äã
reviewStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The review status of the order. Valid values: '1' (pending), '2' 
(submitted), '3' (finalised), '4' (expired)‚Äã
counterpartyDetail‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Counterparty details‚Äã
> merchantId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant id‚Äã

pages.text:
> 
takerPaymentMetho
d‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Taker collection payment method information‚Äã
>> 
paymentMethodId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method Id‚Äã
>> bankCode‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank code‚Äã
>> bankName
String‚Äã
Bank name‚Äã
>> bankBranchName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank branch name‚Äã
>> accountNo‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method number. This could be bank card number, Alipay 
account number, WeChat Id etc‚Äã
>>paymentMethodN
ame‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name. It could be nick name of the user‚Äã
>> 
paymentMethodQrC
odeUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
WeChat QR code, Alipay QR code‚Äã
>>type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method type. Examples: BANK, ALIPAY, WXPAY, 
WESTERN_UNION, PAY_PAL, SWIFT, PAY_NOW, PAYTM, QIWI‚Äã
>> > currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Example: CNY, USD‚Äã
>> isDisabled‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the payment method is disabled‚Äã
>>decodingUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method QR code decoding URL‚Äã
>>paymentDescripti
on‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method description. Example: bank payment, WeChat, 
Alipay‚Äã
>> adsLinkedCount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of ads linked to this payment method‚Äã
>>isInstantSettlePay
ment‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
> orders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of buy/sell orders that the user has completed. Example: 10‚Äã
> 
estimatedReleaseTi
me‚Äã
String‚Äã
Estimated crypto release time‚Äã
> userId‚Äã
String‚Äã
User Id‚Äã
>nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the user‚Äã

Specifies the transaction side or direction. Use buy to indicate a 
buy transaction, sell for a sell transaction, or all to include both buy 
and sell transactions. Default: all‚Äã
pageIndex‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã

ncies‚Äã

crypto currency symbols. Example: BTC, ETH‚Äã

es‚Äã

No‚Äã

currency symbols. Example: CNY,USD‚Äã

cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol‚Äã
unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
The unit price of the order‚Äã
priceMargin‚Äã
String‚Äã
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only 
for ads with price type as floating price‚Äã
exchangeRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
Exchange rate‚Äã
cryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of crypto currency traded‚Äã
fiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of fiat currency traded‚Äã
paymentStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The payment status of the order. Valid values: unpaid, paid, 
unreceived, confirmed, rejected‚Äã
createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was created‚Äã
completedTimesta
mp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was completed‚Äã
updatedTimestam
p‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp of the last change made to the order‚Äã
completionType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of completion for the order. Example: 
cancelled_by_buyer‚Äã
expiredInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration time of the order in seconds‚Äã
expiredAfterInSeco
nds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration duration after completion in seconds‚Äã
frozenType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of freeze applied to the order. Valid values: 
sellerRejectPaid, customerService, sellerArbitration, 
appealFreeze‚Äã
disputeStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The dispute status of the order. Valid values: 0 (not appealed), 
1 (maker appealed), 2 (taker appealed), 3 (cancelled), 4 
(completed)‚Äã
disputeType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of dispute‚Äã
disputeSubType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The subtype of dispute‚Äã
disputeResult‚Äã
String‚Äã
The result of the dispute‚Äã
disputeTime‚Äã
String‚Äã
The time of the dispute‚Äã

hasMakerBeenRe
minded‚Äã

canRaiseDispute‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã

reviewStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The review status of the order. Valid values: '1' (pending), '2' 
(submitted), '3' (finalised), '4' (expired)‚Äã
counterpartyDetail‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Counterparty details‚Äã

String‚Äã
Merchant id‚Äã

hod‚Äã
Object‚Äã

>>paymentMethod
Id‚Äã
String‚Äã

>>bankCode‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank code‚Äã
>>bankName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank name‚Äã
>>bankBranchNa
me‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank branch name‚Äã
>>paymentMethod
Number‚Äã
String‚Äã

Alipay account number, WeChat Id etc‚Äã
>>paymentMethod
Name‚Äã
String‚Äã

>>paymentMethod
QrCodeUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã

>>type‚Äã

>>>currency‚Äã

>>adsLinkedCount‚Äã

>>isInstantSettleP
ayment‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
>orders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of buy/sell orders that the user has completed. 
Example: 10‚Äã

Time‚Äã
String‚Äã
Estimated crypto release time‚Äã
>id‚Äã
String‚Äã
User Id‚Äã
>nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the user‚Äã
>realName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Real name of the user‚Äã
>targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: ‚Äã
common‚Äã
certified‚Äã
diamond‚Äã
all‚Äã
>completedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of orders completed by the user‚Äã
>cancelledOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of orders canceled by the user‚Äã
>completedSellOr
ders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of sell orders completed by the user‚Äã
>completionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
The order completion rate of the user‚Äã
>kycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã

>acceptStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã

>avgPaymentTime
InSeconds‚Äã

>avgCompletionTi
meInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã

>createdTimestam
p‚Äã
String‚Äã
User joining timestamp in milliseconds‚Äã
>hasAlreadyTrade
d‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Specifies whether the user has traded in the past with the 
requester. Valid values: true, false‚Äã

pages.text:
2.4 Get Counterparty User Details‚Äã
Obtain counterparty user information for the order.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
GET /api/v5/p2p/order/counterparty-user-info‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parame
ter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
orderId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Order id‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
merchantId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant id‚Äã
takerPaymentMeth
od‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Taker collection payment method information‚Äã
>paymentMethodI
d‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method Id‚Äã
>bankCode‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank code‚Äã
>bankName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank name‚Äã
>bankBranchName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank branch name‚Äã
>paymentMethodN
umber‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method number. This could be bank card number, Alipay 
account number, WeChat Id etc‚Äã
>paymentMethodN
ame‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name. It could be nick name of the user‚Äã
>paymentMethodQ
rCodeUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
WeChat QR code, Alipay QR code‚Äã
>type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method type. Examples: BANK, ALIPAY, WXPAY, 
WESTERN_UNION, PAY_PAL, SWIFT, PAY_NOW, PAYTM, QIWI‚Äã
>currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Example: CNY, USD‚Äã

>isDisabled‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies whether the payment method is disabled‚Äã
>decodingUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method QR code decoding URL‚Äã
>paymentDescripti
on‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method description. Example: bank payment, WeChat, Alipay‚Äã
>adsLinkedCount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of ads linked to this payment method‚Äã
>isInstantSettlePay
ment‚Äã
String‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
orders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of buy/sell orders that the user has completed. Example: 10‚Äã
estimatedReleaseT
ime‚Äã
String‚Äã
Estimated crypto release time‚Äã
userId ‚Äã
String‚Äã
User Id‚Äã
nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the user‚Äã
realName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Real name of the user‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
User type. Valid values: ‚Äã
common‚Äã
certified‚Äã
diamond‚Äã
completedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of orders completed by the user‚Äã
cancelledOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of orders canceled by the user‚Äã
completedSellOrde
rs‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of sell orders completed by the user‚Äã
completionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
The order completion rate of the user‚Äã
kycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The identity verification level of the user‚Äã
acceptStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order acceptance status of the user. Valid values: 0 (do not accept 
order), 1 (accept order)‚Äã
avgPaymentTimeIn
Seconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average payment time in seconds‚Äã
avgCompletionTim
eInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average completion time in seconds‚Äã
createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
User joining timestamp in milliseconds‚Äã

The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only for ads 
with price type as floating price‚Äã
exchangeRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
Exchange rate‚Äã
cryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of crypto currency traded‚Äã
fiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of fiat currency traded‚Äã
paymentStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The payment status of the order. Valid values: unpaid, paid, 
unreceived, confirmed, rejected‚Äã
createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was created‚Äã
completionTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was completed‚Äã
updatedTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp of the last change made to the order‚Äã
completionType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of completion for the order. Example: cancelled_by_buyer‚Äã
expiredInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration time of the order in seconds‚Äã
expiredAfterInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration duration after completion in seconds‚Äã
frozenType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of freeze applied to the order. Valid values: 
sellerRejectPaid, customerService, sellerArbitration, appealFreeze‚Äã
disputeStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The dispute status of the order. Valid values: 0 (not appealed), 1 
(maker appealed), 2 (taker appealed), 3 (cancelled), 4 (completed)‚Äã

String‚Äã
The type of dispute‚Äã
disputeSubType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The subtype of dispute‚Äã
disputeResult‚Äã
String‚Äã

disputeTime‚Äã
String‚Äã

hasMakerBeenRemind
ed‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã

canRaiseDispute‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicates whether it is possible to raise dispute‚Äã
reviewStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The review status of the order. Valid values: '1' (pending), '2' 
(submitted), '3' (finalised), '4' (expired)‚Äã

>>paymentMethodId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method Id‚Äã
>>bankCode‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank code‚Äã
>>bankName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank name‚Äã
>>bankBranchName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank branch name‚Äã
>>paymentMethodNu
mber‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method number. This could be bank card number, Alipay 
account number, WeChat Id etc‚Äã
>>paymentMethodNa
me‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name. It could be nick name of the user‚Äã
>>paymentMethodQrC
odeUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
WeChat QR code, Alipay QR code‚Äã
>>type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method type. Examples: BANK, ALIPAY, WXPAY, 
WESTERN_UNION, PAY_PAL, SWIFT, PAY_NOW, PAYTM, QIWI‚Äã
>>>currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Example: CNY, USD‚Äã
>>isDisabled‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the payment method is disabled‚Äã
>>decodingUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method QR code decoding URL‚Äã
>>paymentDescription‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method description. Example: bank payment, WeChat, 
Alipay‚Äã
>>adsLinkedCount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of ads linked to this payment method‚Äã
>>isInstantSettlePaym
ent‚Äã
String‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
>orders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of buy/sell orders that the user has completed. Example: 10‚Äã
>estimatedReleaseTim
e‚Äã
String‚Äã
Estimated crypto release time‚Äã
>userId‚Äã
String‚Äã
User Id‚Äã
>nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the user‚Äã
>realName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Real name of the user‚Äã
>targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: ‚Äã
common‚Äã
certified‚Äã
diamond‚Äã

orderIds‚Äã

3. Payment Method‚Äã
3.1 Add Payment Method‚Äã
Adds a new payment method.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
GET /api/v5/p2p/payment-method/add‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Examples: CNY, VND‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Type of payment method. Examples: BANK, ALIPAY, WXPAY, 
WESTERN_UNION, PAY_PAL, SWIFT, PAY_NOW, PAYTM, QIWI‚Äã
isEnabled‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Specifies whether payment method should be enabled. Valid 
values: true, false‚Äã
application
Type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Type of application. Valid values: -1: (Disabled) 0 (Enabled), 1 
(Deposit payment method, used for receiving payment), 2 
(Withdrawal Payment method, used for paying)‚Äã
details‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Key-value pairs of fields required for adding payment method 
where key is field name and value is field value. Example: 
{"accountNo": "1234"}‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Paramete
r‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
payment
MethodId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Id of the added Payment method‚Äã

currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Examples: CNY, VND‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Type of payment method. Examples: BANK, ALIPAY, WXPAY, 
WESTERN_UNION, PAY_PAL, SWIFT, PAY_NOW, PAYTM, QIWI‚Äã
isEnabled‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Specifies whether payment method should be enabled. Valid 
values: true, false‚Äã
application
Type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Type of application. Valid values: -1: (Disabled) 0 (Enabled), 1 
(Deposit payment method, used for receiving payment), 2 
(Withdrawal Payment method, used for paying)‚Äã
details‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Key-value pairs of fields required for adding payment method 
where key is field name and value is field value. Example: 
{"accountNo": "1234"}‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Paramete
r‚Äã

countryName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Country name‚Äã
countryIcon‚Äã
String‚Äã
Country flag‚Äã
isKycVerified‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the merchant is KYC verified‚Äã
isPhoneVerified‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the user has completed phone verification‚Äã
isEmailVerified‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the user has completed email verification ‚Äã
blacklistStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Blacklist status of the user. Valid values: NO_BLACK (No blacklist 
relationship), BLACK_OTHER (Current user blacklisted the other 
side), BLACKED (The other side blacklisted current user), 
BLACK_EACH_OTHER (Current user and other use blacklisted each 
other)‚Äã
isFollowingUser‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the requester follows the user‚Äã
isSelf‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the requester is the user itself‚Äã
depositAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant's deposit amount‚Äã
depositCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant's deposit currency‚Äã
6.5 Get Merchant Ads‚Äã
Get merchant's add list (not for merchant himself/herself). ‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
GET /api/v5/p2p/merchant/ads‚Äã

d‚Äã

pages.text:
> adId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad id‚Äã
> type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad price type. Valid values: ‚Äã
limit‚Äã
floating_market‚Äã
> side‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Valid values:‚Äã
buy‚Äã
sell‚Äã
> cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
> fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol‚Äã
> minOrderSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order lower limit‚Äã
> maxOrderSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order upper limit‚Äã
> availableAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The available crypto quantity currently available for buying and 
selling‚Äã
> unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
Unit price‚Äã
> priceMargin‚Äã
String‚Äã
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only for 
ads with price type as floating price‚Äã
> minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid 
values: 1,2,3‚Äã
> remark‚Äã
String‚Äã
Additional information or instructions for the ad for taker‚Äã
> createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
Creation time of the ad‚Äã
> isHidden‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad is hidden or not‚Äã
> fiatPriceScale‚Äã
String‚Äã
Decimal places reserved for fiat currency‚Äã
> fiatPriceIncrement‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency increasing unit price gradient‚Äã
> fiatScale‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat Currency decimal places‚Äã
> cryptoScale‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency decimal places‚Äã
> minCompletedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum number of orders completed by the taker‚Äã
> maxCompletedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The maximum number of orders completed by the taker‚Äã
> minSellOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum number of sell orders completed by the taker‚Äã

pages.text:
Get chat history based on order. The messages are ordered from the latest to the oldest. System-
generated messages are not returned.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
GET /api/v5/p2p/chat/history‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
orderId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Optional‚Äã
‚Ä¢
If the orderId  is specified, the API will return all chat 
messages related to that specific order. Note that once the order 
is completed, no further chat messages can be retrieved for that 
order.‚Äã
‚Ä¢
 If the orderId  is not provided, the API will return all available 
chat messages between the counterparty‚Äã
lastMessag
eSequence‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies the last message sequence number. Eg: "123"‚Äã
This param is required if messages are required to be fetched 
backword.‚Äã
pageSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Specifies the number of messages to be retrieved.‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
sentTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
Epoch timestamp for the message sent time‚Äã
isSentBySelf‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies whether requestor is the sender as well‚Äã
content‚Äã
String‚Äã
Text of the content. Eg: "Hello"‚Äã
contentUrl‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
If the message is of a media type (like an image/video, etc.), the URL 
is returned. Content present at this URL can be retrieved for 30 days 
from the time the content is uploaded.‚Äã
lastMessageSequence‚Äã
String‚Äã
The sequence number of the message. Eg: "123"
9.2 Send message‚Äã
Send message for the order to the counterparty.‚Äã

String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The fiat currency symbol. Example: USD‚Äã
isProofRequi
red‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
No‚Äã
Indicates whether a proof (e.g., bank statement) is required for CNY 
ads. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
isPublic‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
No‚Äã
Indicates whether the ad is targeted for public or private 
marketplace. Valid values: true,false
maxOrderLi
mit‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The maximum order limit. Example: 990.00‚Äã
maxPaymen
tDurationIn
Minutes‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The maximum time allowed for payment in minutes before 
timeout happens. Valid values can be fetched from the /config API 
from maxPaymentDurationAllowedValues field.‚Äã
 Examples: 5,10,15,30,60,120‚Äã
minAccount
Age‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The number of days since the user has registered (sign-up date). 
Valid values are: 30, 60, 180, 365‚Äã

minComplet
edOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum number of completed orders by the transaction 
party‚Äã
minComplet
ionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum order completion rate of the taker. Example: 0.95‚Äã
minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid values: 
1,2,3‚Äã
minOrderLi
mit‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The minimum order limit. Example: 890.00
minSellOrde
rs‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum number of sell orders completed by the taker. 
Example: 5‚Äã
paymentMet
hodIds‚Äã
Array of 
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The Ids of payment methods which maker accepts for payments. 
Applicable only for 'sell' ads. Example: [1234]‚Äã
paymentMet
hods‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The payment methods which maker can transact in. Applicable 
only for 'buy' ads. Example: bank‚Äã
priceFloor‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The lowest price before the user's ad is hidden. Applicable only for 
ads with price type as floating_market. Example: 890.00‚Äã
priceMargin‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only for ads 
with price type as floating_market. Example: 0.01‚Äã
remark‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Additional information or trading instructions for the ad for taker‚Äã
side‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Use buy to indicate a 
buy transaction, sell for a sell ‚Äã
transaction.‚Äã
targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: 
common,certified,diamond,all‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Ad price type. Valid values are: limit, floating_market‚Äã
unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The unit price in fiat currency. Applicable only for ads with price 
type as fixed price. Example: 1.1‚Äã
verificationT
ype‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Verification type for overseas ads excluding CNY. Valid values: 0 (No 
verification), 1 (Verification)‚Äã
verificationN
otes‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
No‚Äã
Notes set by the maker for Verification Ads to be shown as a 
prompt to the taker‚Äã

pages.text:

isInstantSettlePaym
ent‚Äã
> transferSpeed‚Äã
String‚Äã
Indicates the speed of the payment method. Valid 
values: ‚Äã
0 (nil): No specific speed requirement or processing time 
mentioned. ‚Äã
1 (real time): Payment is expected to be processed 
immediately or in real-time.‚Äã
2 (instant crypto release): Payment release or 
confirmation is expected to be instant for cryptocurrency 
transactions.‚Äã
3 (up to X days): Payment processing may take up to a 
certain number of days, where X represents the specific 
number of days mentioned.‚Äã

nRate‚Äã

The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable 
only for ads with price type as floating price‚Äã

PerOrder‚Äã

>id‚Äã
Integer‚Äã
Verification note Id. ‚Äã

pages.text:
>> min‚Äã
Integer‚Äã
Min payment account duration value
>> maxLength‚Äã
Integer‚Äã
Max length for others constraint value‚Äã
>variables‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Variables specified by the user for verification notes‚Äã
>> num‚Äã
Integer‚Äã
Number‚Äã
>> others‚Äã
String‚Äã
Miscellaneous‚Äã
verificationType‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies the verification type. Applies for Overseas Ads. 
Valid values:‚Äã
0 (no verification required)‚Äã
1 (verification required)‚Äã
whitelistedCountrie
s‚Äã
String‚Äã
Regions that the taker must be from, as set by the maker 
of the ad‚Äã
1.3 Update Ad‚Äã
This operation would cancel the existing order and create a new one. If the required parameters 
are not passed, then we default to using the old ad values. ‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
POST /api/v5/p2p/ad/update‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
adId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Id of the Ad which needs to be updated‚Äã
online‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Status of the ad: true (online), false (offline)‚Äã
minOrderLimit‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum order limit. Example: 890.00
maxOrderLimi
t‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The maximum order limit. Example: 990.00‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Ad price type. Valid values are: limit, floating_market‚Äã
priceMargin‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only for 
ads with price type as floating price. Example: 0.01‚Äã
unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The unit price in fiat currency. Applicable only for ads with price 
type as fixed price. Example: 1.1‚Äã

cryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The quantity of cryptocurrency‚Äã
priceFloor‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The lowest price before the user's ad is hidden. Example: 890.00‚Äã
isPublic‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Indicates whether the ad is targeted for public or private 
marketplace. Valid values: true,false
paymentMeth
odIds‚Äã
Array of 
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The Ids of payment methods which maker accepts for payments. 
Applicable only for 'sell' ads. Example: [1234]‚Äã
paymentMeth
ods‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The payment methods which maker can transact in. Applicable 
only for 'buy' ads. Example: bank‚Äã
minCompleted
Orders‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum number of completed orders by the taker‚Äã
minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid values: 
1,2,3‚Äã
minSellOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum number of sell orders completed by the taker. 
Example: 5‚Äã
minCompletio
nRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum order completion rate of the taker. Example: 0.95‚Äã
minAccountAg
e‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The number of days since the user has registered (sign-up date). 
Valid values are: 30, 60, 180, 365‚Äã
targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: 
common,certified,diamond,all‚Äã
maxPaymentD
urationInMinut
es‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The maximum time allowed for payment in minutes before 
timeout happens. Valid values: 5,10,15,30,60,120‚Äã
isProofRequire
d‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Indicates whether proof (e.g., bank statement) is required for CNY 
ads. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
whitelistedCou
ntries‚Äã
Array of 
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Regions that the taker must be from. Use ALL_COUNTRIES for 
including all countries. For other countries use the two-digit Id. 
Example: [US,UK,CA]‚Äã
verificationTyp
e‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Verification type for overseas ads excluding CNY. Example: 0 (No 
verification), 1 (Verification))‚Äã
verificationNot
es‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
No‚Äã
Notes set by the maker for Verification Ads to be shown as a 
prompt to the taker‚Äã
Valid values (CNY): ‚Äã

ter‚Äã

status‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã

r‚Äã

pages.text:
side‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Use buy to 
indicate a buy transaction, sell for a sell transaction, or all to 
include both buy and sell transactions.‚Äã
cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol‚Äã
targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: 
common,certified,diamond,all,blockTrade,flashtrade‚Äã
minCryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Minimum amount of crypto‚Äã
cryptoQuota‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The crypto currency limit, which is the amount of crypto 
currency multiplied by the unit price and the comparison of 
the limit of the order. Example: 5.9‚Äã
minFiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Fiat currency quantity (ads with fiat amount less than this 
number would be filtered out)‚Äã
maxFiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Fiat currency quantity (ads with fiat amount greater than 
this number would be filtered out)‚Äã
minFiatAmountPerOr
der‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The minimum fiat amount required for a single order. Any 
ads with orders placed for an amount less than this 
threshold will be filtered out‚Äã
maxFiatAmountPerO
rder‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
The maximum fiat amount required for a single order. Any 
ads with orders placed for an amount greater than this 
threshold will be filtered out‚Äã
paymentMethod‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Payment method. Default: all. Examples: all, bank, aliPay, 
wxPay‚Äã
isTradable‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad is tradable or not. Default: false‚Äã
isSecurityLimitApplic
able‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether to show T+1 ads. Default: false‚Äã
shouldShowOnlyFoll
ow‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether to fetch ads from users which the current 
user follows. Default: false. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
showAlreadyTraded‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether to fetch ads which have already been 
traded with the user. Default: false. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
isProofRequired‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether verification is required for the ads. 
Default: false. Valid values: true, false‚Äã

hideOverseasVerifica
tionAds‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies whether to hide overseas verification ads. Default: 
false. Applies only for non-CNY regions. Valid values: true, 
false‚Äã
limit‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Maximum number of items returned‚Äã
sortType‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Sort type for the ads. Valid values: 
default,recommended,price_asc,price_desc‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
sellAds‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Collection of sell ad details‚Äã
buyAds‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Collection of buy ad details‚Äã
> adId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad Id‚Äã
> minSellOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Minimum number of sell orders completed by the trading 
party‚Äã
> side‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Valid values: 
buy,sell,block_buy,block_sell‚Äã
> cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
> fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol‚Äã
> minOrderSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order lower limit‚Äã
> maxOrderSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order upper limit‚Äã
> availableAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The available current quantity that can be bought/sold‚Äã
> unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
The unit price in fiat currency. Applicable only for ads with 
price type as fixed price. Example: 1.1‚Äã
> creator‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Information about the ad creator.‚Äã
>> hasAlreadyTraded‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad creator has already traded with the 
user‚Äã
>> nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the ad creator‚Äã

pages.text:
>> userId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Id of the ad creator‚Äã
>> cancelledOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of orders cancelled by the user‚Äã
>> merchantId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant Id‚Äã
>> type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad creator type. Valid values: all, common (non-
authenticated), certified (authenticated)‚Äã
>> completedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Total orders completed by the ad creator‚Äã
>> completionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
Completion rate of the ad creator‚Äã
>> isBlacklistedByUser‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad creator is blocked by the user‚Äã
> paymentMethods‚Äã
Array of 
String‚Äã
Collection of payment methods. Example: bank, aliPay, 
wxPay‚Äã
> 
paymentMethodBasicIn
foList‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Collection of payment method basic info set by the maker. 
Applicable for buy ads‚Äã
>> paymentMethod‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name‚Äã
>> 
isInstantSettlePayment‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
>> transferSpeed‚Äã
String‚Äã
Indicates the speed of the payment method. Valid values: ‚Äã
0 (nil): No specific speed requirement or processing time 
mentioned. ‚Äã
1 (real time): Payment is expected to be processed 
immediately or in real-time.‚Äã
2 (instant crypto release): Payment release or confirmation is 
expected to be instant for cryptocurrency transactions.‚Äã
3 (up to X days): Payment processing may take up to a 
certain number of days, where X represents the specific 
number of days mentioned.‚Äã
> fiatScale‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat Currency decimal places‚Äã
> isOwner‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad belongs to the user‚Äã
> minCompletedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum number of completed orders specified by the 
ad creator‚Äã
> maxCompletedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The maximum number of completed orders specified by the 
ad creator‚Äã

> minCompletionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum completion rate of the taker specified by the 
ad creator‚Äã
> targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: ‚Äã
common‚Äã
certified‚Äã
diamond‚Äã
all‚Äã
> 
maxAvgCompletionTim
e‚Äã
String‚Äã
The maximum average completion time of the taker‚Äã
> 
isSecurityLimitApplicabl
e‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether T+1 ad‚Äã
> isProofRequired‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicates whether a proof (e.g., bank statement) is required 
for CNY ads. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
> verificationType‚Äã
String‚Äã
Verification type for overseas ads excluding CNY. Valid 
values: 0 (No verification), 1 (Verification)‚Äã
> fiatSymbol
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Examples: Ôø•,$‚Äã
recommendedAd‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Recommended ads‚Äã
> userGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
User group that can see ad. Valid values: 0 (new users), 1 
(returning users), 2 (both)‚Äã
> ad‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Ad details. Schema is the same as what it is for buy/sell ads‚Äã

pages.text:
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Valid values: 
buy,sell,block_buy,block_sell‚Äã
cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol‚Äã
cryptoDecimalPlaces‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency decimal places‚Äã
fiatDecimalPlaces‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency decimal places‚Äã
minOrderLimit‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum order limit. Example: 890.00
maxOrderLimit‚Äã
String‚Äã
The maximum order limit. Example: 990.00‚Äã
unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
The unit price in fiat currency. Applicable only for ads with price type 
as fixed price. Example: 1.1‚Äã
fiatPriceScale‚Äã
String‚Äã
Decimal places reserved for fiat currency‚Äã
fiatPriceIncrement‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency increasing unit price gradient‚Äã
paymentMethods‚Äã
Array of 
String‚Äã
The payment methods which maker can transact in. Applicable only 
for 'buy' ads. Examples: bank,aliPay,wxPay‚Äã
depositPaymentMeth
ods‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Collection of deposit payment methods‚Äã
> paymentMethod
String‚Äã
Payment method code. Example: bank‚Äã
> description‚Äã
String‚Äã
Description of payment method‚Äã
remark‚Äã
String‚Äã
Additional information or instructions for the ad for taker‚Äã
minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid values: 
1,2,3‚Äã
targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: 
common,certified,diamond,all‚Äã
availableAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The available crypto quantity currently available for buying and 
selling‚Äã
nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the creator‚Äã
minCompletionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum order completion rate of the taker. Example: 0.95‚Äã
minCompletedOrder
s‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum number of completed orders specified by the ad 
creator‚Äã
String‚Äã

maxCompletedOrder
s‚Äã
The maximum number of completed orders specified by the ad 
creator‚Äã
isPublic‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicates whether the ad is targeted for public or private 
marketplace. Valid values: true,false
userLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad creator level. Valid valuesÔºöcommonÔºåcertifiedÔºådiamond‚Äã
minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid values: 
1,2,3‚Äã
1.9 Get Active ads‚Äã
Get active ads for the user. Schema is similar to Get Ad API.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
GET /api/v5/p2p/ad/active-list‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
side‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Use buy to indicate a 
buy transaction, sell for a sell ‚Äã
transaction.‚Äã
cryptoCurren
cy‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The crypto currency symbol. Example: BTC‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
The fiat currency symbol. Example: USD‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
adId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad id‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
Ad price type. Valid values: ‚Äã
limit‚Äã
floating_market‚Äã
side‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Valid values:‚Äã
buy‚Äã

pages.text:
> kycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The identity verification level of the user‚Äã
> acceptStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order acceptance status of the user. Valid values: 0 (do not 
accept order), 1 (accept order)‚Äã
> 
avgPaymentTimeInSecon
ds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average payment time in seconds‚Äã
> 
avgCompletionTimeInSec
onds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average completion time in seconds‚Äã
> createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
User joining timestamp in milliseconds‚Äã
> hasAlreadyTraded‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Specifies whether the user has traded in the past with the 
requester. Valid values: true, false‚Äã
> 
paymentMethodBasicInfo
List‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Collection of payment method basic info set by the maker. 
Applicable for buy ads.‚Äã
>> paymentMethod‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name‚Äã
>> isInstantSettlePayment‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
>> transferSpeed‚Äã
String‚Äã
Indicates the speed of the payment method. Valid values: ‚Äã
0 (nil): No specific speed requirement or processing time 
mentioned. ‚Äã
1 (real time): Payment is expected to be processed immediately 
or in real-time.‚Äã
2 (instant crypto release): Payment release or confirmation is 
expected to be instant for cryptocurrency transactions.‚Äã
3 (up to X days): Payment processing may take up to a certain 
number of days, where X represents the specific number of days 
mentioned.‚Äã
minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid values: 
1,2,3‚Äã
remark‚Äã
String‚Äã
Additional information or instructions for the ad for taker‚Äã
createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
Creation time of the ad‚Äã
isHidden‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad is hidden or not‚Äã

blockTradeForUserAllow
ed‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Specifies whether the user is eligible to place block trades. Valid 
values: true/false‚Äã
blockTradeForFiatAllowe
d‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Specifies whether block trade is allowed for this fiat currency. 
Valid values: true/false‚Äã
minBlockTradeAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Valid values:‚Äã
buy‚Äã
sell‚Äã
orderLimits‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
> min‚Äã
String‚Äã
Limit lower value. Ad min and max values should be greater than 
this value.‚Äã
> max‚Äã
String‚Äã
Limit upper value. Ad min and max values should be less than this 
value.‚Äã
optimalPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
Optimal price for buy/sell ads‚Äã
tradableFiatCurrencies‚Äã
Array of 
Object‚Äã
Tradable fiat currencies based on kyc level of the user‚Äã
> currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency code. Examples: CNY, VND, USD‚Äã
 > symbol‚Äã
String‚Äã
Symbol of fiat currency. Examples: Ôø•, $‚Äã

owed‚Äã

Maximum number of payment methods allowed. Applicable only 
for buy ads‚Äã

hodsAllowed‚Äã

Maximum number of payment methods allowed. Applicable only 
for sell ads‚Äã
maxPaymentDurationAll
owedValues‚Äã
String‚Äã
Provides possible values for maximum payment duration 
(mayPaymentDuration in create ad API)‚Äã
verificationNoteOptions‚Äã
Array of

Type of verification options that the maker can set to be shown to 
the taker for verification Ads. Only applicable for the CNY region 
for now‚Äã

Object‚Äã
Top buy top sell price‚Äã

e‚Äã

>

2. Order‚Äã
2.1 Create Order‚Äã
Creates a new ad.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
POST /api/v5/p2p/order/create‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Requir
ed‚Äã
Description‚Äã
adId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Ad id for which order would be placed against‚Äã
cryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Crypto amount. Example: 1.1‚Äã
cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Crypto currency for the ad. Example: "BTC"‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Fiat currency for the ad. Example: "USD"‚Äã
makerPayment
MethodId‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Maker payment method Id‚Äã
paymentMethod‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Payment method of the counterparty. When buying crypto, it's 
the payment method of the maker.‚Äã
totalFiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Total fiat amount for the order. Example: 100.2‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Paramete
r‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
orderId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Id of the created order‚Äã
status‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order status. Valid values: 2 (new), 3 (cancelled), 4 (completed)‚Äã
orderProc
essStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order process status. Valid values:‚Äã
2 (new)‚Äã
3 (cancelled)‚Äã

priceMargin‚Äã
String‚Äã
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only for ads 
with price type as floating price‚Äã
exchangeRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
Exchange rate‚Äã
cryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of crypto currency traded‚Äã
fiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of fiat currency traded‚Äã
paymentStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The payment status of the order. Valid values: unpaid, paid, 
unreceived, confirmed, rejected‚Äã
createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was created‚Äã
completionTimesta
mp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was completed‚Äã
updatedTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp of the last change made to the order‚Äã
completionType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of completion for the order. Example: cancelled_by_buyer‚Äã
expiredInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration time of the order in seconds‚Äã
expiredAfterInSecon
ds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration duration after completion in seconds‚Äã
frozenType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of freeze applied to the order. Valid values: sellerRejectPaid, 
customerService, sellerArbitration, appealFreeze‚Äã
disputeStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The dispute status of the order. Valid values: 0 (not appealed), 1 
(maker appealed), 2 (taker appealed), 3 (cancelled), 4 (completed)‚Äã
disputeType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of dispute‚Äã
disputeSubType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The subtype of dispute‚Äã
disputeResult‚Äã
String‚Äã
The result of the dispute‚Äã
disputeTime‚Äã
String‚Äã
The time of the dispute‚Äã
hasMakerBeenRemin
ded‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicates whether the maker has been reminded‚Äã
canRaiseDispute‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicates whether it is possible to raise dispute‚Äã
reviewStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The review status of the order. Valid values: '1' (pending), '2' 
(submitted), '3' (finalised), '4' (expired)‚Äã
counterpartyDetail‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Counterparty details‚Äã
> merchantId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant id‚Äã

pages.text:
> 
takerPaymentMetho
d‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Taker collection payment method information‚Äã
>> 
paymentMethodId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method Id‚Äã
>> bankCode‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank code‚Äã
>> bankName
String‚Äã
Bank name‚Äã
>> bankBranchName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank branch name‚Äã
>> accountNo‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method number. This could be bank card number, Alipay 
account number, WeChat Id etc‚Äã
>>paymentMethodN
ame‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name. It could be nick name of the user‚Äã
>> 
paymentMethodQrC
odeUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
WeChat QR code, Alipay QR code‚Äã
>>type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method type. Examples: BANK, ALIPAY, WXPAY, 
WESTERN_UNION, PAY_PAL, SWIFT, PAY_NOW, PAYTM, QIWI‚Äã
>> > currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Example: CNY, USD‚Äã
>> isDisabled‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the payment method is disabled‚Äã
>>decodingUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method QR code decoding URL‚Äã
>>paymentDescripti
on‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method description. Example: bank payment, WeChat, 
Alipay‚Äã
>> adsLinkedCount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of ads linked to this payment method‚Äã
>>isInstantSettlePay
ment‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
> orders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of buy/sell orders that the user has completed. Example: 10‚Äã
> 
estimatedReleaseTi
me‚Äã
String‚Äã
Estimated crypto release time‚Äã
> userId‚Äã
String‚Äã
User Id‚Äã
>nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the user‚Äã

> realName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Real name of the user‚Äã
> type‚Äã
String‚Äã
User type. Valid values: ‚Äã
common‚Äã
certified‚Äã
diamond‚Äã
> completedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of orders completed by the user‚Äã
> cancelledOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of orders canceled by the user‚Äã
> 
completedSellOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of sell orders completed by the user‚Äã
>completionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
The order completion rate of the user‚Äã
>kycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The identity verification level of the user‚Äã
>acceptStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order acceptance status of the user. Valid values: 0 (do not accept 
order), 1 (accept order)‚Äã
>avgPaymentTimeIn
Seconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average payment time in seconds‚Äã
>avgCompletionTim
eInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average completion time in seconds‚Äã
>createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
User joining timestamp in milliseconds‚Äã
>hasAlreadyTraded‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the user has traded in the past with the requester. 
Valid values: true, false‚Äã

pages.text:
side‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Use buy to indicate a 
buy transaction, sell for a sell transaction, or all to include both buy 
and sell transactions. Default: all‚Äã
pageIndex‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Page index starting from 1. Default: 1‚Äã
pageSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Number of orders to fetch. Default: 20‚Äã
cryptoCurre
ncies‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies crypto currencies. Valid values are comma-separated 
crypto currency symbols. Example: BTC, ETH‚Äã
fiatCurrenci
es‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies fiat currencies. Valid values are comma-separated fiat 
currency symbols. Example: CNY,USD‚Äã
start‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Search start timestamp. Unix timestamp format in milliseconds.‚Äã
end‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Search end timestamp. Unix timestamp format in milliseconds.‚Äã
completion
Status‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies completion status category. Valid values:‚Äã
all - all types of order are needed ‚Äã
pending - orders which aren't completed/cancelled‚Äã
completed - orders which are completed/cancelled‚Äã
Default: all‚Äã
searchKeyw
ord‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Search orders by either Order Id or User nickname‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
adId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Id of the Ad against which order was placed‚Äã
orderId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order Id‚Äã
side‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Valid values: buy, 
sell‚Äã
isBlockTradeCateg
ory‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Indicates whether the transaction is classified as a block trade‚Äã
orderStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order status. Valid values: new, cancelled, completed‚Äã
isFrozen‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Indicates whether the order is frozen‚Äã

cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol‚Äã
unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
The unit price of the order‚Äã
priceMargin‚Äã
String‚Äã
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only 
for ads with price type as floating price‚Äã
exchangeRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
Exchange rate‚Äã
cryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of crypto currency traded‚Äã
fiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of fiat currency traded‚Äã
paymentStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The payment status of the order. Valid values: unpaid, paid, 
unreceived, confirmed, rejected‚Äã
createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was created‚Äã
completedTimesta
mp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was completed‚Äã
updatedTimestam
p‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp of the last change made to the order‚Äã
completionType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of completion for the order. Example: 
cancelled_by_buyer‚Äã
expiredInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration time of the order in seconds‚Äã
expiredAfterInSeco
nds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration duration after completion in seconds‚Äã
frozenType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of freeze applied to the order. Valid values: 
sellerRejectPaid, customerService, sellerArbitration, 
appealFreeze‚Äã
disputeStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The dispute status of the order. Valid values: 0 (not appealed), 
1 (maker appealed), 2 (taker appealed), 3 (cancelled), 4 
(completed)‚Äã
disputeType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of dispute‚Äã
disputeSubType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The subtype of dispute‚Äã
disputeResult‚Äã
String‚Äã
The result of the dispute‚Äã
disputeTime‚Äã
String‚Äã
The time of the dispute‚Äã

hasMakerBeenRe
minded‚Äã

canRaiseDispute‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã

reviewStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The review status of the order. Valid values: '1' (pending), '2' 
(submitted), '3' (finalised), '4' (expired)‚Äã
counterpartyDetail‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Counterparty details‚Äã
>merchantId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant id‚Äã
>takerPaymentMet
hod‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Taker collection payment method information‚Äã
>>paymentMethod
Id‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method Id‚Äã
>>bankCode‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank code‚Äã
>>bankName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank name‚Äã
>>bankBranchNa
me‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank branch name‚Äã
>>paymentMethod
Number‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method number. This could be bank card number, 
Alipay account number, WeChat Id etc‚Äã
>>paymentMethod
Name‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name. It could be nick name of the user‚Äã
>>paymentMethod
QrCodeUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã

>>type‚Äã
String‚Äã

>>>currency‚Äã

>>adsLinkedCount‚Äã
String‚Äã

>>isInstantSettleP
ayment‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
>orders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of buy/sell orders that the user has completed. 
Example: 10‚Äã
>estimatedRelease
Time‚Äã
String‚Äã
Estimated crypto release time‚Äã
>id‚Äã
String‚Äã
User Id‚Äã
>nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the user‚Äã
>realName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Real name of the user‚Äã
>targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: ‚Äã
common‚Äã
certified‚Äã
diamond‚Äã
all‚Äã
>completedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of orders completed by the user‚Äã
>cancelledOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of orders canceled by the user‚Äã
>completedSellOr
ders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of sell orders completed by the user‚Äã
>completionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
The order completion rate of the user‚Äã
>kycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The identity verification level of the user‚Äã
>acceptStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã

accept order), 1 (accept order)‚Äã
>avgPaymentTime
InSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average payment time in seconds‚Äã
>avgCompletionTi
meInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average completion time in seconds‚Äã
>createdTimestam
p‚Äã
String‚Äã
User joining timestamp in milliseconds‚Äã
>hasAlreadyTrade
d‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Specifies whether the user has traded in the past with the 
requester. Valid values: true, false‚Äã

pages.text:
2.4 Get Counterparty User Details‚Äã
Obtain counterparty user information for the order.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
GET /api/v5/p2p/order/counterparty-user-info‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parame
ter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
orderId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Order id‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
merchantId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant id‚Äã
takerPaymentMeth
od‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Taker collection payment method information‚Äã
>paymentMethodI
d‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method Id‚Äã
>bankCode‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank code‚Äã
>bankName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank name‚Äã
>bankBranchName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank branch name‚Äã
>paymentMethodN
umber‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method number. This could be bank card number, Alipay 
account number, WeChat Id etc‚Äã
>paymentMethodN
ame‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name. It could be nick name of the user‚Äã
>paymentMethodQ
rCodeUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
WeChat QR code, Alipay QR code‚Äã
>type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method type. Examples: BANK, ALIPAY, WXPAY, 
WESTERN_UNION, PAY_PAL, SWIFT, PAY_NOW, PAYTM, QIWI‚Äã
>currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Example: CNY, USD‚Äã

>isDisabled‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies whether the payment method is disabled‚Äã
>decodingUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method QR code decoding URL‚Äã
>paymentDescripti
on‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method description. Example: bank payment, WeChat, Alipay‚Äã
>adsLinkedCount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of ads linked to this payment method‚Äã
>isInstantSettlePay
ment‚Äã
String‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
orders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of buy/sell orders that the user has completed. Example: 10‚Äã
estimatedReleaseT
ime‚Äã
String‚Äã
Estimated crypto release time‚Äã
userId ‚Äã
String‚Äã
User Id‚Äã
nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the user‚Äã
realName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Real name of the user‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
User type. Valid values: ‚Äã
common‚Äã
certified‚Äã
diamond‚Äã
completedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of orders completed by the user‚Äã
cancelledOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of orders canceled by the user‚Äã
completedSellOrde
rs‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of sell orders completed by the user‚Äã
completionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
The order completion rate of the user‚Äã
kycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The identity verification level of the user‚Äã
acceptStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order acceptance status of the user. Valid values: 0 (do not accept 
order), 1 (accept order)‚Äã
avgPaymentTimeIn
Seconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average payment time in seconds‚Äã
avgCompletionTim
eInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Average completion time in seconds‚Äã
createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
User joining timestamp in milliseconds‚Äã

pages.text:
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only for ads 
with price type as floating price‚Äã
exchangeRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
Exchange rate‚Äã
cryptoAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of crypto currency traded‚Äã
fiatAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The amount of fiat currency traded‚Äã
paymentStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The payment status of the order. Valid values: unpaid, paid, 
unreceived, confirmed, rejected‚Äã
createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was created‚Äã
completionTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp when the order was completed‚Äã
updatedTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
The timestamp of the last change made to the order‚Äã
completionType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of completion for the order. Example: cancelled_by_buyer‚Äã
expiredInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration time of the order in seconds‚Äã
expiredAfterInSeconds‚Äã
String‚Äã
The expiration duration after completion in seconds‚Äã
frozenType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of freeze applied to the order. Valid values: 
sellerRejectPaid, customerService, sellerArbitration, appealFreeze‚Äã
disputeStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The dispute status of the order. Valid values: 0 (not appealed), 1 
(maker appealed), 2 (taker appealed), 3 (cancelled), 4 (completed)‚Äã
disputeType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The type of dispute‚Äã
disputeSubType‚Äã
String‚Äã
The subtype of dispute‚Äã
disputeResult‚Äã
String‚Äã
The result of the dispute‚Äã
disputeTime‚Äã
String‚Äã
The time of the dispute‚Äã
hasMakerBeenRemind
ed‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicates whether the maker has been reminded‚Äã
canRaiseDispute‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Indicates whether it is possible to raise dispute‚Äã
reviewStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
The review status of the order. Valid values: '1' (pending), '2' 
(submitted), '3' (finalised), '4' (expired)‚Äã
counterpartyDetail‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Counterparty details‚Äã
>merchantId‚Äã

Merchant id‚Äã
>takerPaymentMethod‚Äã
Object‚Äã

pages.text:
>>paymentMethodId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method Id‚Äã
>>bankCode‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank code‚Äã
>>bankName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank name‚Äã
>>bankBranchName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Bank branch name‚Äã
>>paymentMethodNu
mber‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method number. This could be bank card number, Alipay 
account number, WeChat Id etc‚Äã
>>paymentMethodNa
me‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method name. It could be nick name of the user‚Äã
>>paymentMethodQrC
odeUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
WeChat QR code, Alipay QR code‚Äã
>>type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method type. Examples: BANK, ALIPAY, WXPAY, 
WESTERN_UNION, PAY_PAL, SWIFT, PAY_NOW, PAYTM, QIWI‚Äã
>>>currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Example: CNY, USD‚Äã
>>isDisabled‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the payment method is disabled‚Äã
>>decodingUrl‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method QR code decoding URL‚Äã
>>paymentDescription‚Äã
String‚Äã
Payment method description. Example: bank payment, WeChat, 
Alipay‚Äã
>>adsLinkedCount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of ads linked to this payment method‚Äã
>>isInstantSettlePaym
ent‚Äã
String‚Äã
Indicate whether the payment method instantly settle‚Äã
>orders‚Äã
String‚Äã
Number of buy/sell orders that the user has completed. Example: 10‚Äã
>estimatedReleaseTim
e‚Äã
String‚Äã
Estimated crypto release time‚Äã
>userId‚Äã
String‚Äã
User Id‚Äã
>nickName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Nick name of the user‚Äã
>realName‚Äã
String‚Äã
Real name of the user‚Äã
>targetGroup‚Äã
String‚Äã
User target group for the ad. Valid values: ‚Äã
common‚Äã
certified‚Äã
diamond‚Äã

>completedSellOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The number of sell orders completed by the user‚Äã
>completionRate‚Äã
String‚Äã
The order completion rate of the user‚Äã
>kycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The identity verification level of the user‚Äã
>acceptStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order acceptance status of the user. Valid values: 0 (do not accept 
order), 1 (accept order)‚Äã

econds‚Äã

nSeconds‚Äã

3. Payment Method‚Äã
3.1 Add Payment Method‚Äã
Adds a new payment method.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
GET /api/v5/p2p/payment-method/add‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Examples: CNY, VND‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Type of payment method. Examples: BANK, ALIPAY, WXPAY, 
WESTERN_UNION, PAY_PAL, SWIFT, PAY_NOW, PAYTM, QIWI‚Äã
isEnabled‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Specifies whether payment method should be enabled. Valid 
values: true, false‚Äã
application
Type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Type of application. Valid values: -1: (Disabled) 0 (Enabled), 1 
(Deposit payment method, used for receiving payment), 2 
(Withdrawal Payment method, used for paying)‚Äã
details‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Key-value pairs of fields required for adding payment method 
where key is field name and value is field value. Example: 
{"accountNo": "1234"}‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Paramete
r‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
payment
MethodId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Id of the added Payment method‚Äã

currency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol. Examples: CNY, VND‚Äã
type
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Type of payment method. Examples: BANK, ALIPAY, WXPAY, 
WESTERN_UNION, PAY_PAL, SWIFT, PAY_NOW, PAYTM, QIWI‚Äã
isEnabled‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Specifies whether payment method should be enabled. Valid 
values: true, false‚Äã
application
Type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Type of application. Valid values: -1: (Disabled) 0 (Enabled), 1 
(Deposit payment method, used for receiving payment), 2 
(Withdrawal Payment method, used for paying)‚Äã
details‚Äã
Object‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Key-value pairs of fields required for adding payment method 
where key is field name and value is field value. Example: 
{"accountNo": "1234"}‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Paramete
r‚Äã

5.8 Update Online Status‚Äã
Updates user online status. If the user chooses to be offline, no ad can be placed against the ads 
created by the user.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
POST /api/v5/p2p/user/update-online-status‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
status‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
User online status. Valid values: hidden (makes user offline), show 
(makes user online)‚Äã

Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã

Updated online status‚Äã

String‚Äã
Country flag‚Äã
isKycVerified‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the merchant is KYC verified‚Äã
isPhoneVerified‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the user has completed phone verification‚Äã
isEmailVerified‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the user has completed email verification ‚Äã
blacklistStatus‚Äã
String‚Äã
Blacklist status of the user. Valid values: NO_BLACK (No blacklist 
relationship), BLACK_OTHER (Current user blacklisted the other 
side), BLACKED (The other side blacklisted current user), 
BLACK_EACH_OTHER (Current user and other use blacklisted each 
other)‚Äã
isFollowingUser‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the requester follows the user‚Äã
isSelf‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
Specifies whether the requester is the user itself‚Äã
depositAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant's deposit amount‚Äã
depositCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Merchant's deposit currency‚Äã
6.5 Get Merchant Ads‚Äã
Get merchant's add list (not for merchant himself/herself). ‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
GET /api/v5/p2p/merchant/ads‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
userId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Id of the user for which ads are required‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
sellAds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Collection of sell ads. Schema is same as that of buy ads.‚Äã
buyAds‚Äã
String‚Äã
Collection of buy ads. ‚Äã

pages.text:
> adId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad id‚Äã
> type‚Äã
String‚Äã
Ad price type. Valid values: ‚Äã
limit‚Äã
floating_market‚Äã
> side‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies the transaction side or direction. Valid values:‚Äã
buy‚Äã
sell‚Äã
> cryptoCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency symbol‚Äã
> fiatCurrency‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency symbol‚Äã
> minOrderSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order lower limit‚Äã
> maxOrderSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Order upper limit‚Äã
> availableAmount‚Äã
String‚Äã
The available crypto quantity currently available for buying and 
selling‚Äã
> unitPrice‚Äã
String‚Äã
Unit price‚Äã
> priceMargin‚Äã
String‚Äã
The price margin ratio for floating type ads. Applicable only for 
ads with price type as floating price‚Äã
> minKycLevel‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum identity verification level of the taker. Valid 
values: 1,2,3‚Äã
> remark‚Äã
String‚Äã
Additional information or instructions for the ad for taker‚Äã
> createdTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
Creation time of the ad‚Äã
> isHidden‚Äã
Boolea
n‚Äã
Specifies whether the ad is hidden or not‚Äã
> fiatPriceScale‚Äã
String‚Äã
Decimal places reserved for fiat currency‚Äã
> fiatPriceIncrement‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat currency increasing unit price gradient‚Äã
> fiatScale‚Äã
String‚Äã
Fiat Currency decimal places‚Äã
> cryptoScale‚Äã
String‚Äã
Crypto currency decimal places‚Äã
> minCompletedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum number of orders completed by the taker‚Äã
> maxCompletedOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The maximum number of orders completed by the taker‚Äã
> minSellOrders‚Äã
String‚Äã
The minimum number of sell orders completed by the taker‚Äã

pages.text:
Get chat history based on order. The messages are ordered from the latest to the oldest. System-
generated messages are not returned.‚Äã
HTTP Request‚Äã
GET /api/v5/p2p/chat/history‚Äã
Request Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Require
d‚Äã
Description‚Äã
orderId‚Äã
String‚Äã
Optional‚Äã
‚Ä¢
If the orderId  is specified, the API will return all chat 
messages related to that specific order. Note that once the order 
is completed, no further chat messages can be retrieved for that 
order.‚Äã
‚Ä¢
 If the orderId  is not provided, the API will return all available 
chat messages between the counterparty‚Äã
lastMessag
eSequence‚Äã
String‚Äã
No‚Äã
Specifies the last message sequence number. Eg: "123"‚Äã
This param is required if messages are required to be fetched 
backword.‚Äã
pageSize‚Äã
String‚Äã
Yes‚Äã
Specifies the number of messages to be retrieved.‚Äã
Response Parameters‚Äã
Parameter‚Äã
Type‚Äã
Description‚Äã
sentTimestamp‚Äã
String‚Äã
Epoch timestamp for the message sent time‚Äã
isSentBySelf‚Äã
String‚Äã
Specifies whether requestor is the sender as well‚Äã
content‚Äã
String‚Äã
Text of the content. Eg: "Hello"‚Äã
contentUrl‚Äã
Boolean‚Äã
If the message is of a media type (like an image/video, etc.), the URL 
is returned. Content present at this URL can be retrieved for 30 days 
from the time the content is uploaded.‚Äã
lastMessageSequence‚Äã
String‚Äã
The sequence number of the message. Eg: "123"
9.2 Send message‚Äã
Send message for the order to the counterparty.‚Äã
